message.body:
$VCIG this is a swing only stock especially come June 4th when everyone will be able to day trade. Stocks will no longer be long holds. Swings only. 
https://www.schwab.com/learn/story/sec-approves-scrapping-25000-day-trader-minimum

data.text: this is a swing only stock especially come June 4th when everyone will be able to day trade. Stocks will no longer be long holds. Swings only.

data.title: SEC Approves Scrapping $25,000 Day Trader Minimum
data.description: Under the new rules, traders will no longer be required to maintain an account balance of $25,000 to engage in frequent margin day trading.

links.title: SEC Approves Scrapping $25,000 Day Trader Minimum

message.body:
$VCIG 🚨SEE ATTACHED + QUOTED SPOT ON COMMENT BY @lowfloatmix 🚨

LEG UP TO $15 STARTING IMMINENTLY (1.5-2 HOURS, 10 AM OR EARLIER)

EVENTUALLY MAKES WAY TO $30 & POSSIBLY HIGHER IN NEXT 2-5 DAYS

FOR TODAY, 6/3:

Attached:
👉 Red boxes = full pattern duration
👉 Yellow boxes = leg up
👉 Blue arrows = approx price pattern signature

1️⃣ WHAT: May 29 pattern about to repeat
2️⃣ TIME: Will start soon in premarket or just after open
3️⃣ DURATION: Likely will take most of the day or into AH, possibly into tomorrow
4️⃣ VOLATILITY: Likely multiple halts up on the way to $15

Almost a 2X from here

At $15 it still won’t be done- at least 1-2 more legs rest of this week, possibly into next week IMO

🟩🟩🟩💰💰💰
